extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL attacked from the GC group on Col d'Izoard, caught breakaway rider ATAPUMA inside final kilometer, winning Stage 18 solo.
tactical_patterns: BARGUIL overcame 7-minute deficit to ATAPUMA on final climb, showing superior climbing from GC group than breakaway specialist.
BARDET burned team support for 4-second time bonus sprint, clawed third place despite needing 90+ seconds for podium viability.
LANDA attacked to draw FROOME's rivals but they refused bait, forcing SKY leader to cover himself—revealing GC rivals' passivity.
Two-second gap given between FROOME and URAN despite finishing together suggests commissaires saw micro-separation at line.

rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: won from GC group despite 7-minute breakaway gap, confirming best pure climber status beyond polkadot consistency metric
rider_signals.ATAPUMA Darwin: positive: held breakaway lead until final kilometer on Izoard despite BARGUIL's pursuit, strong Independence Day performance
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: spent team resources sprinting for 4 seconds when needing 90+ second gaps, tactical desperation over mathematics
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: attacked to animate stage for SKY tactical purposes but rivals refused engagement, team player role
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: forced to cover LANDA himself when rivals ignored bait, suggests GC group settled into defensive posture
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: lost 4 seconds to BARDET and 2-second commissaire gap to FROOME, surrendered second place through passive finale
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: holds green jersey after KITTEL abandonment, SUNWEB now controlling two classifications
